name: vigil-summit-agent
description: Consent-aware B2B event engagement and conversion platform.

scripts.test:integration: sh -c 'docker compose exec -T postgres createdb -U vigil vigil_test 2>/dev/null || true; docker compose exec -T -e DATABASE_URL=postgresql://vigil:vigil@postgres:5432/vigil_test -e NODE_ENV=test -e JWT_SECRET=replace-with-local-development-secret api pnpm --filter @flowpilot/api test:integration:container'
scripts.test:smoke: docker compose exec -T -e API_BASE_URL=http://api:3000/api api node scripts/smoke-demo.mjs
